# Contributing

**The issue tracker is only for bug reports and enhancement suggestions. If you have a question, please ask it in the
Discord server instead of opening an issue – you will get redirected there anyway.**

If you wish to contribute to the Findingway's codebase or documentation, feel free to fork the repository and
submit a pull request.

## Setup

To get ready to work on the codebase, please do the following:

1. Fork & clone the repository, and make sure you're on the **master** branch
2. Run `go mod download`
3. Code your heart out!
4. Ensure your changes compile (`go build -ldflags="-w -s" -o findingway .`).
5. Submit a pull request
